title: Upon Lucia.
content:
I ask'd my Lucia but a kiss,
    And she with scorn denied me this;
    Say then, how ill should I have sped,
    Had I then ask'd her maidenhead?
meaning:
"Upon Lucia." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
